summary: Completed frontend testing of AgendaTimeline component. All 8 features tested and passed. Timeline renders correctly with hour markers, booking blocks positioned at correct times, action buttons functional, client click opens modal, empty state displays correctly, and block colors correspond to booking status.
passed_tests: Frontend: AgendaTimeline renders with data-testid='agenda-timeline' - PASSED
Frontend: Hour lines (AM/PM) displayed as vertical guide (9 AM, 10 AM, 11 AM, 12 PM, 1 PM) - PASSED
Frontend: Booking blocks positioned at correct times (Walk-in Client at 10:00 AM top=80px, Test User at 11:00 AM top=160px) - PASSED
Frontend: Each block shows client name (Walk-in Client, Test User), service (Corte de cabello), and time range (10:00 AM - 10:45 AM) - PASSED
Frontend: Completar button present (1 found), Reagendar button present (1 found), Cancelar buttons present (2 found) - PASSED
Frontend: Reagendar button opens 'Reagendar Cita' modal with calendar to select new date - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking client name opens 'Detalle del cliente' modal with client history - PASSED
Frontend: Empty state shows 'No hay citas para este dia' with calendar icon when no bookings (April 7, 2026) - PASSED
Frontend: Block colors correspond to status - blue=confirmed (Walk-in Client), red=cancelled (Test User), amber=hold - PASSED
Frontend: Timeline blocks have data-testid='timeline-block-{id}' for each booking - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: AgendaTimeline.jsx correctly calculates hour range from bookings with 1-hour padding
Block positioning uses 80px per hour height with correct top/height calculations
Status colors properly mapped: confirmed=blue, completed=emerald, cancelled=red, hold=amber
Action buttons conditionally rendered based on hasPermission() checks
Empty state displays calendar icon with localized message
Client name click handler properly triggers onClientClick callback
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing bookings on March 30, 2026 (Walk-in Client at 10:00 AM, Test User at 11:00 AM).
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgendaTimeline feature fully tested. Key points: (1) Component renders with data-testid='agenda-timeline'. (2) Hour markers show AM/PM format. (3) Booking blocks positioned using top style based on time (80px per hour). (4) Block colors: blue=confirmed, emerald=completed, red=cancelled, amber=hold. (5) Action buttons: Completar (disabled until booking end time passes), Reagendar (opens reschedule modal), Cancelar (cancels booking). (6) Client name click opens 'Detalle del cliente' modal with history. (7) Empty state shows 'No hay citas para este dia'. (8) Test data: March 30, 2026 has 2 bookings at 10:00 AM and 11:00 AM.

action_buttons.completar: Enabled only when booking end time has passed

agenda_timeline_feature_verification.empty_state: Calendar icon + 'No hay citas para este dia' message
